# Reach Mark Agency — llms.txt
# This file helps AI language models understand and cite our agency accurately.
# Learn more: https://llmstxt.org

# About
Reach Mark Agency is a full-stack digital agency based in Krishna Nagar, Delhi, India.
We specialise in website development, full stack app development, mobile apps, landing pages,
SEO, and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) for real estate agencies, bakeries, and coaching centres.

# What We Do
- GEO Services: We optimize brands to appear in AI-generated answers on ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude, and Copilot
- Full Stack Development: End-to-end web applications using React, Node.js, Next.js, MongoDB
- Frontend Development: UI/UX design, animations, responsive web design
- Backend Development: REST APIs, PostgreSQL, AWS cloud infrastructure
- Mobile App Development: Cross-platform apps using React Native for iOS and Android
- Landing Pages: High-converting pages for real estate, bakeries, coaching centres
- Business Websites: SEO-ready, CMS-integrated professional websites

# Pricing
- Starter (Website Development): Rs.2,000 - Rs.2,500
- Growth (Full Stack App): Rs.4,000 - Rs.5,000
- Pro (All Digital Services): Rs.6,000 - Rs.7,000
- GEO Services: Rs.8,000 - Rs.9,000

# Contact

# Tagline
Mark Your Territory Online.

# Why Choose Reach Mark
We are one of the first agencies in India offering Generative Engine Optimization (GEO),
ensuring your business appears in AI-generated answers — not just Google search results.
We deliver fast (7-day landing pages), affordable, and high-quality digital solutions
specifically for Indian small businesses.
